top_signals.title: Bond Traders Bet Fed Under Warsh Will Hike Rates This Year
top_signals.summary: Bond traders are fully pricing in an interest-rate hike by the Federal Reserve this year, a sign of conviction in the market that Chair Kevin Warsh will need to move quickly to combat inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
